indexNote: Draft's note claims '77 -> 75 blokov', but the live intermediate.json had 69 blocks before this pass (not 75) — some other, unrelated process shifted indices between draft creation and now. All 33 appliedFixes entries were matched and applied by exact CONTENT search across the whole document (not by trusting block index), per instructions. Every fix was verified to be found; 2 segments needed manual correction because the draft's abbreviated text contained non-literal placeholders ('[odkaz]' for an inline <link>, '(2×)' as an occurrence-count annotation rather than literal text) — both resolved by inspecting the live block directly. Both criticalFix empty blocks (originally at indices 42/49) were found still present at live indices 38/45 and removed. Final block count: 69 -> 67.

criticalFixes.issue: 2 fully empty content.rich-text blocks (body: []) — extraction artifacts with zero content.
criticalFixes.resolution: Located by scanning all rich-text blocks for empty trimmed text (found at live indices 38 and 45, one between the Lupka section and the Zobor heading, matching the draft's description). Removed both. Block count 69 -> 67.
